insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great achievement starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a consistent study routine. By focusing on making progress, one session at a time, you can quickly turn your 0% average score into a meaningful measure of your growth, and before long, you'll be celebrating a streak of successful days and a rising score that reflects your hard work and dedication.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
